Video.summary: During a high - profile serial murder case a old mentor of tony becomes involved with the case.
Video.title: Father Image, Part 2

Video.summary: During a high - profile serial murder case a old mentor of tony becomes involved with the case.
Video.title: Father Image, Part 1

Video.summary: While on the trail of an arsonist, the commish notices that all the clues point to the wife's father.
Video.title: Redemption, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony faces the biggest challenge of his career when an murder case from his past resurfaces.
Video.title: In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2

Image.alt: In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2

Video.summary: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life, knowing that his mob boss father will stop at nothing to revenge his son's death.
Video.title: The Rabbit And The Fox

Video.summary: Armed robber Andy DuPree, has managed to allude authorities across the country and has once again returned to his hometown for his next round of scores.
Video.title: No Good Deed

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust an athletic beachcomber wanted for the armed robbery of a police van, he is blind sided by a female bounty hunter
Video.title: Dead End And Easy Money

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust his latest bounty at a railway station, the man slips from his grasp and the station, but not before stealing a car and killing the owner.
Video.title: White Picket Fences

Video.summary: By returning home to honor the one-year anniversary of his fiancee's death, Reno puts himself precariously close to Lt. Dixon's deadly clutches.
Video.title: The Hound

Video.summary: Reno may have met his match when Bobby sends him after a former heavyweight boxing champion turned convicted killer.
Video.title: The Champ

Video.summary: Reno's only means of saving himself and his brother is to break the psychological hold that Bracket's lies have over Mitch by reminding him of their past.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 2

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover as film execs when a local movie crew becomes the target of militants.
Video.title: Baser Instincts

Video.summary: A rapist returns to haunt Chris for sending him to jail.
Video.title: Good Time Charlie

Video.summary: A Palm Beach society outcast is murdered as he is about to reveal something he says will rock the community. Chris and Rita go undercover to find out the secret.
Video.title: Social Call

Video.summary: As their romance jeopardizes their partnership, Chris joins Rita in pursuit of a drug dealer's vengeful killer.
Video.title: Partners (Part 2)

Video.summary: As their romance heats up, Chris and Rita investigate the murder of a young woman whose boyfriend is about to become a college basketball star.
Video.title: Glory Days

Video.summary: Chris and Rita marry while investigating a media tycoon's murder
Video.title: Till Death Do Us Part

Video.summary: A sexual assault on Hilly exposes a dirty cop's dealings with a ruthless drug lord.
Video.title: The Last Kiss Goodnight

Video.summary: Holly struggles to keep an old acquaintance from being charged in a drug related homicide.
Video.title: Dead Asleep

Video.summary: When a cheerleading candidate is murdered, evidence points to the team's dueling quarterbacks.
Video.title: Sudden Death

Video.summary: The murder of a record producer's estranged wife exposes a gangster's money laundering scheme.
Video.title: Uncivil Wars

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby travel to the tiny town in New Mexico, on the trail of a bail-jumper to find him being hunted down by a posse for murder.
Video.title: The Posse

Video.summary: Cheyenne convinces a reluctant Bobby to post bail and help prove the innocence of her unrequited love who has been arrested for the murder of his wife, Marily
Video.title: Once Burned, Twice Chey

Video.summary: Reno stumbles into a man-hunt for brothers wanted for armed robbery and the confrontation results in the shooting death of the local sheriff.
Video.title: Sheriff Reno

Video.summary: Bobby and a reluctant Reno head to San Francisco when Bobby is contacted by a Import/Export magnate to find alleged Industrial spy Rikki Yeager.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 1

Video.summary: After Reno saves Rikki Yeager from a psychotic bounty hunter, his attempt to turn her over goes up in smoke when the plane sent for their transport explodes in an obvious ambush plot.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 2

Video.summary: When Reno walks into a museum robbery in progress while meeting with Judge Sarah Jessup, both he and the judge are "introduced" to disillusioned Special Investigations cop, Carrick O'Quinn.
Video.title: Carrick O'Quinn
